violations.description: General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Gaps around the back doors.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Containers in the walk in cooler not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Bare wood surfaces in the kitchen area.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
